================================================================================
lambda_simple
================================================================================
a = |x| x
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
lambda_multiple_args
================================================================================
add = |a, b| a + b
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (bin_op_expr
            part: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            part: (operator)
            part: (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

================================================================================
lambda_with_block
================================================================================
foo = |x| {
    y = x + 1
    y
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (const
                    (int)))))
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

================================================================================
lambda_no_args
================================================================================
thunk = || 42
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        body: (expr_body
          (const
            (int)))))))

================================================================================
lambda_effectful
================================================================================
main! = || {
    print!("hello")
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              args: (const
                (string)))))))))

================================================================================
lambda_with_pattern
================================================================================
getX = |{x, y}| x
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (record_pattern
            (record_field_pattern
              (field_name))
            (record_field_pattern
              (field_name))))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
lambda_nested
================================================================================
curry = |a| |b| a + b
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (anon_fun_expr
            args: (argument_patterns
              (identifier_pattern
                (identifier)))
            body: (expr_body
              (bin_op_expr
                part: (variable_expr
                  (identifier))
                part: (operator)
                part: (variable_expr
                  (identifier))))))))))
